writing.task1:
Dear Manager
I booked a meeting room for a client demo. Unfortunately, the projector did not work, and the front desk could not provide a replacement. Because of this, my demo was disrupted and I could not present properly to my client. I have photos and a note of the time showing the issue. Please let me know if you would like me to send these. I kindly request a refund or a credit for this booking
Thank you for your understanding
writing.task2: I agree that secondary schools should require at least one community service project for graduation. Such project help students build empathy and responsibility by contributing to society, skills that are just as important as academic knowledge. For example, student who volunteer at a local shelter not only assist people in need but also develop teamwork and problem solving abilities. Overall, one community-service project can give lasting benefits to both students and the community
writing.task3: From month 1 to month 2, total views fell from 120,000 to 110,000, but both adds to cart and purchases increased. Adds rose from 12,600 to 14,300, while purchases grew from 4,200 to 4,950. This means that although overall traffic declined, the funnel became more efficient, with higher conversion rates at each stage. One possible reason is that the website or product page was improved, which encouraged more visitors to complete their purchase despite fewer overall visits
